title: Decadent Smoked Trout Poutine
description: A rich and indulgent twist on the classic Canadian dish, featuring smoked trout and a side of creamy cheese sauce.
instructions: Cut the French fries into 1-inch pieces and place on a baking sheet.
Drizzle with vegetable oil and toss to coat.
Bake for 15-20 minutes or until golden brown.
In a saucepan, melt the cheddar cheese over low heat.
Add the truffle oil and whisk until smooth.
Add the beef broth and whisk until combined.
Simmer for 2-3 minutes or until the sauce has thickened.
To assemble the poutine, place a portion of French fries on a plate.
Top with a piece of smoked trout and spoon the cheese sauce over the top.
Garnish with chopped scallions and serve immediately.
